# SEO Academy

SEO Academy is a Thai SEO learning and tools site for business owners, marketers, developers, and teams that need practical search growth skills.

Core URLs:
- SEO Academy | Thai SEO Learning and Tools: https://seo-academy.example.com
- SEO Articles | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/Blog
- SEO Article Detail | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/BlogPost
- SEO Games | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/Games
- AI SEO Tools | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/SEOTools
- Google Business Profile and Local SEO Tools | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/GmbTools
- Classic SEO Fundamentals | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/ClassicSEO
- AI Overviews SEO | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/AIOverviews
- Generative Engine Optimization | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/GenerativeEngine
- Google Core Updates Guide | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/CoreUpdates
- PageSpeed and Core Web Vitals | SEO Academy: https://seo-academy.example.com/PageSpeed

Content focus:
- SEO fundamentals and practical implementation
- Blog articles and educational resources
- AI-assisted SEO analysis tools
- Google Business Profile and Local SEO
- AI Overviews, GEO, and future search behavior
- Core Web Vitals and PageSpeed improvement
